tests.test_name: Logged-in user can enable multi-file mode
tests.description: Verifies that enabling multi-file mode shows the file queue and hides the single-file input area.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I enable multi-file mode
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can switch the Analyze page into multi-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the file queue is visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The file queue appears after enabling multi-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: And the single-file input area is not visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The single-file input is hidden when multi-file mode is active

tests.test_name: Switching to multi-file mode clears the single-file input
tests.description: Verifies that any content typed in the single-file input is cleared when the user switches to multi-file mode.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given I have typed content in the input area
test_coverage.what_it_checks: There is existing content in the single-file input before the mode switch

test_coverage.verification_step: When I enable multi-file mode
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user switches to multi-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the input area content is cleared
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously entered content is removed to prevent stale data carrying over

tests.test_name: Switching back to single-file mode clears the queue
tests.description: Verifies that disabling multi-file mode hides the queue, removes any queued files, and restores the single-file input area.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I enable multi-file mode and add a file to the queue
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A file is present in the queue before switching back

test_coverage.verification_step: And I disable multi-file mode
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user switches back to single-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the file queue is not visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The queue is hidden after returning to single-file mode

test_coverage.verification_step: And the single-file input area is visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The single-file input is restored when multi-file mode is turned off

tests.test_name: Files can be added and removed from the queue
tests.description: Verifies that users can add a file to the queue and then remove it, leaving the queue empty.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I add fixture "bdd_sample.feature" to the queue
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A file can be added to the multi-file queue

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the queue shows 1 file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The queue correctly reflects the number of files after adding

test_coverage.verification_step: When I remove "bdd_sample.feature" from the queue
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A file can be removed from the queue

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the queue is empty
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The queue shows no files after the only file is removed

tests.test_name: Files can be added to the queue via drag-and-drop
tests.description: Verifies that users can drag and drop a file onto the queue, which adds it successfully and displays a confirmation badge.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I drop fixture "bdd_sample.feature" onto the queue drop zone
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A file can be added to the queue using drag-and-drop

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the queue shows 1 file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The queue count updates correctly after a drag-and-drop addition

test_coverage.verification_step: And the file row for "bdd_sample.feature" shows an ok badge
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The dropped file is shown with a success indicator confirming it was accepted

tests.test_name: Adding a file with a duplicate filename shows a toast and does not add it to the queue
tests.description: Verifies that attempting to add a file that is already in the queue triggers a warning message and does not create a duplicate entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I add fixture "bdd_sample.feature" to the queue again
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user attempts to add the same file a second time

test_coverage.verification_step: Then I see a warning toast containing "is already in the queue"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A clear warning message is shown to inform the user of the duplicate

test_coverage.verification_step: And the queue shows 1 file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The duplicate file is not added, keeping the queue count unchanged
